# MedWallet

> MedWallet is a Mozambique-focused health super-app: online medical consultations, 24h pharmacy delivery, health records and an MZN health wallet.

## Pages

- [Home](/): App overview and entry points.
- [Pharmacy](/pharmacy): Browse pharmacies and order medication with delivery.
- [Doctors](/health/doctors): Find and book medical consultations.
- [Health facilities](/health/facilities): Directory of clinics and hospitals.
- [Facility explorer](/health/explorer): Map-based facility search.
- [Lab exams](/health/exams): Order laboratory exams online.
- [Health education](/health/education): Articles on health topics from the clinical team.
- [Health plans](/health/plans): Subscription health plans.
- [Symptom triage](/health/triage): AI-guided symptom triage.
- [Insurance](/health/insurance): Health insurance providers and plans.
- [Blood donation hub](/blood): Blood donors and requests.
- [Solidarity](/solidarity): Community solidarity initiatives.
- [Partners](/partners): Partner program information.
- [Subscribe](/subscribe): Subscription plans overview.
- [Legal](/legal): Terms, privacy and legal documents.
- [Help](/help): Support and FAQ.

## Optional

- [Sign in](/auth): Authentication.
